---
title: "About"
body-classes: "ed-page"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    code-tools: false
---

```{=html}
<main class="ed">

<!-- Hero -->
<section class="l-hero">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <div class="l-hero-row">
      <div>
        <p class="l-eyebrow">About</p>
        <h1>Brian Cervantes Alvarez</h1>
        <p class="l-lede">
          Statistician, data scientist, and educator. I turn data into stories
          and solutions people can actually use — built on a foundation of
          mathematics, statistics, and applied data science.
        </p>
        <div class="l-cta-row">
          <a href="mailto:briancervantesalvarez@gmail.com" class="l-btn">Email me</a>
          <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/bcervantesalvarez" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="l-btn l-btn--ghost">LinkedIn</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <img src="/images/profile.jpg" alt="Portrait of Brian Cervantes Alvarez"
           class="l-portrait" loading="eager">
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Background -->
<section class="l-section first">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Background</p>
    <h2>The short version</h2>
    <p>
      My journey started with a love for math, grew into a passion for data
      science, and led to a master's degree in Statistics at Oregon State
      University. OSU shaped me into a statistician who understands complex
      methods and values the ethical responsibility that comes with working
      in data.
    </p>
    <p>
      While at Oregon State I helped bring a modern data-science approach to
      the Department of Statistics, working alongside faculty to upgrade
      tools while learning from their deep expertise. Whether teaching
      statistical methods, building simulations, or running applied research,
      I aim for work that is impactful, responsible, and rooted in integrity.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Education -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Education</p>
    <h2>Where I trained</h2>
    <ul class="l-list">
      <li>
        <div class="l-list-label">M.S. Statistics</div>
        <div class="l-list-body">Oregon State University — Bayesian methods, experimental design, and applied modeling. Taught undergraduate sections and developed data-visualization curriculum.</div>
      </li>
      <li>
        <div class="l-list-label">M.S. Data Science</div>
        <div class="l-list-body">Willamette University — Machine learning, predictive modeling, and reproducible analytics workflows.</div>
      </li>
      <li>
        <div class="l-list-label">B.S. Mathematics</div>
        <div class="l-list-body">Linfield University — Calculus, linear algebra, statistics, and the analytical foundations everything sits on.</div>
      </li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Expertise -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Expertise</p>
    <h2>What I bring</h2>
    <div class="l-cols">
      <div>
        <h3>Predictive modeling &amp; statistical methods</h3>
        <p>Time-to-event analysis, spatial statistics, simulations — applied to real, often messy, real-world problems.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Machine learning</h3>
        <p>Trained and interpreted models from random forests and SVMs to gradient boosting and neural networks, with an emphasis on explainability.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Reproducible analytics</h3>
        <p>R, Python, SQL, and a stack of tools for time-series, visualization, and reproducible reporting that holds up under review.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Experimentation &amp; consulting</h3>
        <p>Designed experiments and worked with clients directly. Honest, useful advice — no fluff and no overselling.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Data storytelling</h3>
        <p>Breaking down complicated analyses into visuals and stories people actually care about. It is one of my favorite parts of the process.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Teaching</h3>
        <p>Curriculum design, interactive labs (Shiny, webR, Quarto), and the kind of materials students actually want to revisit.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Aspirations -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">What's next</p>
    <h2>Where I'm headed</h2>
    <p>
      I'm currently looking for industry roles where statistical rigor meets
      pragmatic shipping. The long-term goal: six or seven years in industry
      before returning to academia for a Ph.D. in data science. In the
      meantime I keep contributing to reproducible workflows, statistical
      consulting practice, and teaching materials that travel beyond a
      single classroom.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Outside work -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Outside work</p>
    <h2>Things I'm into</h2>
    <div class="l-cols">
      <div>
        <h3>Travel</h3>
        <p>Recent loop through Madrid, Barcelona, Venice, Rome, and Paris. Every city had its own rhythm and I came back with more ideas than souvenirs.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Audio</h3>
        <p>A bit obsessed with good sound — tuning the car system, comparing headphones, and chasing balanced reproduction.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Gaming &amp; tech</h3>
        <p>Gaming is a side quest these days, but I still build PCs and follow new hardware closely.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>AI &amp; learning</h3>
        <p>Exploring how modern AI tooling actually works in practice — and where it does not yet pull its weight.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Travels grid -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Recent travels</p>
    <h2>Europe, December 2024</h2>
    <p class="l-lede">A two-week loop across Spain, Italy, and France.</p>

    <div class="l-travel-grid">
      <figure class="l-travel-item">
        <img src="/images/about/madrid.jpeg" alt="Madrid, Spain" loading="lazy">
        <figcaption class="l-travel-cap">
          <strong>Madrid</strong>
          <span>Dec 12–13, 2024</span>
        </figcaption>
      </figure>
      <figure class="l-travel-item">
        <img src="/images/about/barcelona.jpg" alt="Barcelona, Spain" loading="lazy">
        <figcaption class="l-travel-cap">
          <strong>Barcelona</strong>
          <span>Dec 14, 2024</span>
        </figcaption>
      </figure>
      <figure class="l-travel-item">
        <img src="/images/about/venice.jpg" alt="Venice, Italy" loading="lazy">
        <figcaption class="l-travel-cap">
          <strong>Venice</strong>
          <span>Dec 15–17, 2024</span>
        </figcaption>
      </figure>
      <figure class="l-travel-item">
        <img src="/images/about/rome.jpg" alt="Rome, Italy" loading="lazy">
        <figcaption class="l-travel-cap">
          <strong>Rome</strong>
          <span>Dec 18–20, 2024</span>
        </figcaption>
      </figure>
      <figure class="l-travel-item">
        <img src="/images/about/france.jpg" alt="Paris, France" loading="lazy">
        <figcaption class="l-travel-cap">
          <strong>Paris</strong>
          <span>Dec 21–22, 2024</span>
        </figcaption>
      </figure>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

</main>
```
